holdings.infoBox: AFSM is an equity ETF with a total of 335 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 1.86%, TTM Technologies at 1.40%, Viavi Solutions at 1.21%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.01%, and Blue Bird at 0.93%.

overview.description: The First Trust Active Factor Small Cap ETF (AFSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US small-cap companies that exhibit exposure to one or more investing factors. AFSM was launched on Dec 3, 2019 and is issued by First Trust.
